title: St'ructure Tools Continued (Building Gadget)
description: Building Gadget for Fabric st'ructure tools continued aims to make building a little easier.
body: `St'ructure Tools Continued` AKA Building Gadget but for fabric aims to make building a little easier. At this time there are `four` tools, which will help you build your St'ructures. Alternatively, watch the following mod spotlight for instructions!   Requires: Fabric API, and Cloth Config API.   This mod is an unofficial port of Building Gadgets, but most of the information from the below mod spotlight should still apply   Note: This mod does NOT include the construction paste stuff as its a pain to port.
